title: Platoon system inapplicable to superintendent or commanding officer
doc_html:
§2194.  Platoon system inapplicable to superintendent or commanding officer

The three-platoon system herein established does not apply to the superintendent of police or commanding officer of the department.
doc_text:
§2194.  Platoon system inapplicable to superintendent or commanding officer
The three-platoon system herein established does not apply to the superintendent of police or commanding officer of the department.
